_comment: Sales totals vs return amounts by customer birth country — a two-fact query. total_sales roots at store_sales and total_returns roots at store_returns; both join to the shared customer dimension. The planner plans each fact branch independently then stitches with a FULL OUTER JOIN on c_birth_country (D-022, M:N stitch). Shows the MERGE codegen step (step_006 in the output). Render with: osi compile examples/models/tpcds_thin.yaml examples/queries/tpcds_sales_vs_returns.json --dialect duckdb
